properties.dose: Sublingual Threshold: 100-300ug. Light: 300-500ug. Common: 500-1000ug Strong: 1000-1250ug+ | Note: Do not exceed 1500ug.
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: Uncommon analogue of 2C-D. Extremely potent psychedelic with stimulating qualities. The drug can cause dangerous vasoconstriction at high doses. May induce uncomfortable body load.
properties.test-kits: Marquis: Orange > Red. | Mecke: Brown > Green. | Mandelin: Red and Green. | Liebermann: Yellow > Black. | Simon's: Red > Brown. | Ehrlich: No colour change.
